caption: A computer screen displays a web browser with multiple open tabs and a video conferencing interface. The main window shows a complex concept map with various circular icons connected by blue lines on a black background. Legible labels within the map include "Knowledge," "Learning," "Instruction," "Intuition," and "Practice." A smaller video feed in the upper right corner shows a man wearing a dark blue baseball cap and a dark shirt. At the top of the browser, several tabs are visible, including titles such as "True & Learning by Systemantics," "Future of Society by Systemantics," and "Rural Community Food System." The interface includes a URL bar showing "blackboard.com" and navigation buttons. Across the sequence, the screen remains mostly static, with the man in the video feed and the conceptual diagram remaining in place, while a mouse cursor moves slightly across the black background of the concept map.
